wiki.summary: “RATHER LIE” is the third collaboration from The Weeknd and Playboi Carti, most recently with “Timeless (feat Playboi Carti)”. The song was first previewed during Rolling Loud’s 10th-anniversary festival, where Carti also showcased four additional unreleased songs from his album, MUSIC. The lyrics are a double entendre that can be interpreted as both about The Weeknd’s relationship with his partner as well as Carti’s relationship with his fans. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “RATHER LIE” is the third collaboration from The Weeknd and Playboi Carti, most recently with “Timeless (feat Playboi Carti)”. The song was first previewed during Rolling Loud’s 10th-anniversary festival, where Carti also showcased four additional unreleased songs from his album, MUSIC. The lyrics are a double entendre that can be interpreted as both about The Weeknd’s relationship with his partner as well as Carti’s relationship with his fans. The track features a more melodic instrumental than Carti’s typical rage-infused tracks. Much like “Timeless” and the accompanying song “FINE SHIT”, the song is speculated to have AI vocals recorded by Lawson for a majority of Carti’s presence. Read more on Last.fm.
